reviews.school_name: Holy Angels High School - Baban Guda,Bolarum
reviews.author: Samvrant Samal
reviews.review_body: Great school. Affordable fees, high quality teaching, good infrastructure, wholesome facilities. They just don't focus on academics but also co curricular activities for all-round development. This school has produced some finest doctors, engineers and many successful men and women of high moral value and decency. If you're looking for a good school in your neighborhood, this is the one for you.

reviews.school_name: Holy Angels High School - Baban Guda,Bolarum
reviews.author: ROHITH ROY
reviews.review_body: The bestest place to study at and it also provide the manual as well as electronically education such as smart classes and the basic computer skills as well as the extra activities like vollyball basket ball and also other sports in which students show ther interest in the school mainly focus on the language and the atticate of students and teachers are well experienced and as per current situation the students are maid to speak in English so that they can be giving ther best compition in the society.

reviews.school_name: Holy Angels High School - Baban Guda,Bolarum
reviews.author: SURAJ JOY
reviews.review_body:
It's a nice place, located in the outskirts of Bolarum, in front of the Bolarum railway station. This school is based on state board and has classes till Tenth grade. Bus facilities are available for many places and the school timings are from 9 to 4. The school conducts many extra curricular activities apart from academics, and it has gained popularity in past few years. Overall a good school.
THANKYOU

reviews.school_name: Holy Angels High School - Baban Guda,Bolarum
reviews.author: Vishal Kanhaiya
reviews.review_body: average school with an education from 1- 10th class. The results are good enough for this school to be one of the first choices in the locality. This school is funded by a trust from chennai. It also does have a little playground as well as an assembly ground. It is opposite to the bolarum railway mmts and nearby risala bazar bus stop and thus reaching school is not a problem for the students coming from far away places.
